title: Uniswap v4 Core Whitepaper
notes: Hooks can manage swap fees dynamically.
Volatility-shifting dynamic fees are an explicit example.
Supports modular overlays rather than one monolithic fee surface.

title: Optimal Fees for Liquidity Provision in Automated Market Makers
notes: Optimal fees are stable in normal conditions and high in very high volatility.
Threshold-type dynamic fee schedules are described as robust.

title: Decentralised Finance and Automated Market Making: Predictable Loss and Optimal Liquidity Provision
notes: LP performance depends on predictable losses and concentration risk.
When drift is present, skewing liquidity can improve outcomes.

title: FLAIR: A Metric for Liquidity Provider Competitiveness in Automated Market Makers
notes: Separates adverse selection from LP competitiveness.
Supports targeted repricing instead of broad fee floors.

title: Mitigating Risk and Loss in AMM Liquidity Pools: A Dynamic Fee System Based on Risk Prediction
notes: Uses recent-price-range features and markouts to adapt fees.
Useful as supporting evidence for fast-decay price-jump memory.
